title: Termination date
doc_html:
§2576. Termination date

           [Effective Date: Section terminated June 30, 1991.]

           The task force shall terminate on June 30, 1991.

           Acts 1989, No. 294, §1, eff. June 27, 1989; Acts 1990, No. 417, §1, eff. July 18, 1990.

{{NOTE: R.S. 46:2576 (ACTS 1989, NO. 294) PROVIDED TERMINATION DATE FOR TASK FORCE AS 6/30/90. ACTS 1990, NO. 417, EFF. 7/18/90 PROVIDED TERMINATION DATE OF 6/30/91.}}
doc_text:
§2576.  Termination date
[Effective Date: Section terminated June 30, 1991.]
The task force shall terminate on June 30, 1991.
Acts 1989, No. 294, §1, eff. June 27, 1989; Acts 1990, No. 417, §1, eff.
July 18, 1990.
{{NOTE:  R.S. 46:2576 (ACTS 1989, NO. 294) PROVIDED
TERMINATION DATE FOR TASK FORCE AS 6/30/90.
ACTS 1990, NO. 417, EFF. 7/18/90 PROVIDED
TERMINATION DATE OF 6/30/91.}}
